title: Welcome Message
description: Greets new members with a welcome card and sends them the server rules via DM.

fields.label: Rules channel
fields.help: Linked from the rules message via the {rulesChannel} token. Leave empty to omit the link.

fields.label: Welcome channel
fields.help: Channel where the welcome card is posted when a member joins. Leave empty to disable.

fields.label: Rules message
fields.help: Sent to the new member via DM (and posted in-channel if their DMs are closed). Tokens: {rulesChannel}

fields.label: Welcome line
fields.help: Posted with the welcome card. Tokens: {mention}

fields.label: Rules channel fallback
fields.help: Used when the rules DM fails. Tokens: {mention}, {rules}
